params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567 입니다. 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있나요?
params.context: PC2 claude-in-chrome MCP first wave. Target = decisive verdict on prior #887 INCONCLUSIVE (Korean SPA shadow DOM — windows-mcp could not discover input element). claude-in-chrome DOM-aware element discovery (including shadow DOM piercing via CDP) should resolve. Mission anchor: PII prompt → warning visible on user screen. tag=v2.2.4-d29d868-postfix-pc2-wave1.

test_steps: 1. Open URL via claude-in-chrome (logged in if applicable; skip if NEEDS_LOGIN)
2. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) to ensure fresh APF connection
3. Locate prompt input via DOM-aware discovery (shadow DOM ok)
4. Submit PII prompt via CDP dispatch
5. Observe DOM/network: warning bubble OR replacement page OR alert
7. result.json: warning_rendered, engine_intercept_fired, notes (shadow DOM piercing 동작 여부 + INCONCLUSIVE → decisive verdict 전환)

verdict_criteria.OK: warning visible to user (any delivery method) — mission satisfied
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL: engine intercept fired but no visible warning
verdict_criteria.FAIL_NOT_RENDERED: engine fired + DOM inject but invisible
verdict_criteria.FAIL_INVALID_TEST: PII prompt 미제출 (element discovery 한계) — engine 미도달
verdict_criteria.FAIL: no engine activity and no warning

notes: PC2 claude-in-chrome MCP — DOM-aware navigation, shadow DOM piercing via CDP. Decisive verdict for prior #887 INCONCLUSIVE (Korean SPA shadow DOM). tag=v2.2.4-d29d868-postfix-pc2-wave1
